business.name: 3 FELLERS, LLC
business.tagline: Tree removal and storm cleanup specialists

hero.headline: When trees come down, *3 Fellers* cleans up
hero.subheadline: Storm damage or planned removal — we show up with the gear and get it done right

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every job gets the same treatment
services_section.subheading: Professional equipment, clean finish, fair price

services.title: Tree Removal
services.description: Safe takedown of any size tree. We handle the cutting, hauling, and cleanup so your yard looks better than before.

services.title: Storm Damage Cleanup
services.description: Emergency response for fallen trees and debris. We clear roofs, driveways, and yards to get you back to normal.

services.title: Stump Grinding
services.description: Complete stump removal below ground level. No more mowing around stumps or tripping hazards in your yard.

services.title: Debris Hauling
services.description: Full cleanup and removal of all tree waste. We don't leave a mess — your property stays clean throughout the job.

about.heading: York's tree crew that actually shows up
about.body: We're the team your neighbors call when trees need to come down. Professional equipment, fair pricing, and we clean up like we were never there.

reviews.name: Jacob E.
reviews.text: Very reasonable pricing and impressed with their knowledge and professionalism. Showed up on time, got the job done quickly, left everything clean and tidy.

reviews.name: Regina T.
reviews.text: Excellent job removing trees and debris from our shed roof after a storm. Reasonably priced, professional and efficient. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Kacy H.
reviews.text: Very impressive job! Asked for minimal yard damage on two large trees in a small yard. Couldn't be happier with their work and cleanup.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving York County
service_areas.subheading: Professional tree service throughout the region

cta.heading: Ready to clear those trees?
cta.body: Free estimates on all tree removal and storm cleanup. Call or email us today to schedule your quote.
